transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Did your professor answer your email about the project?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. She asked me to stop by her office tomorrow afternoon to discuss it.

transcript.question_intro: What will the woman probably do tomorrow afternoon?

questions.prompt: What will the woman probably do tomorrow afternoon?
questions.explanation: The professor asked her to come to the office to discuss the project.
questions.evidence: She asked me to stop by her office tomorrow afternoon.
